title: Bail granted for corruption, fraud co-accused
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Xolisa Msizi, the second accused in the case against Sergeant Jacobus ‘JM’ Spangenberg of the K9 Langeberg Unit, was released on bail of R2 000.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Xolisa Msizi, the second accused in the case against Sergeant Jacobus ‘JM’ Spangenberg of the K9 Langeberg Unit, was released on bail of R2 000."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Msizi briefly appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 15 October, when his bail application was finalised.","html":"Msizi briefly appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 15 October, when his bail application was finalised."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He was arrested on Thursday 9 October, a day after Spangenberg was granted bail of R5 000."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both are facing charges of corruption, fraud, defeating the ends of justice and possession of explosives.","html":"Both are facing charges of corruption, fraud, defeating the ends of justice and possession of explosives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Msizi will reappear in court with Spangenberg on Wednesday 3 December.","html":"Msizi will reappear in court with Spangenberg on Wednesday 3 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jacobus 'JM' Spangenberg.","html":"Jacobus 'JM' Spangenberg. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles: "},{"type":"list","items":["Second accused charged in case against K9 Sergeant","Mossel Bay K9 sergeant up for possession of explosives, fraud","Mossel Bay K9 sergeant arrested"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
